\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5770 introduces Propagator Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} G_{\text{eff}}(t) = G_{0}\bigl[1 + \varepsilon \cos(\omega t)\bigr], \end{equation}
